textByHash.a5132814d5295c0add805798bbefcbf4049b7a08: What a surprise. Enakhra coming up with a flawed plan as usual.
textByHash.09eadae34ac99fb58759e677ae39b93b30e37291: I'd like to see you try. Come, Azzanadra. We can make short work of these traitors and claim the Horn for Zaros.
textByHash.51189577affc0bff7b4bcbfba302b76e9e17af88: Who are you hiding? Khazard? He always loved lurking in the shadows.
textByHash.5ef7e30d63daa8bf3d035da919e5bf466797a378: We do not hide like you do. We came alone.
textByHash.9d19a1a31c1799f6534a5e5a375182789be4d22d: He needed you to open the vault.
textByHash.87e31bf9bd4a027cbcea3b2820d6d601ab7c83b5: You will not be taking that Horn, Enakhra. Not while I stand.
textByHash.77f571c7919c57402e62e31747c3860f0f7dfc17: Our allies must be informed of this. Come, Azzanadra.
textByHash.bc49a3a202cf19ef6046a7f6a4a7ea90bd7e8aeb: Well, why would Zamorak want a temple? You said he needed weapons instead.
textByHash.1b07d5aae2311ec14fbfa7a50671921aebaf4c01: So you've seen sense? You'll join our side?
textByHash.79f91a16ac464b3fa3b2952e27e582775c5b3d9e: After thousands of years... finally, I am no longer her slave.
textByHash.404e06ce47ccfa47d631a00bc7b868e609a0cb75: Honour demands that I reward you... and yet you have no room to carry my reward. Please, return when you can take it from me.
textByHash.2e8c8dfb04ccc808886501bf397a67038ca1fd25: As thanks for your help, young man, please take this amulet of mine.
textByHash.02b0d5e7d75abeb91b880a530f3e57a8b8c6b1d2: As thanks for your help, young woman, please take this amulet of mine.
textByHash.8c0c42bad22c0a6f5c718ceee81f41b5a650e8e4: As thanks for your help, young one, please take this amulet of mine.
textByHash.36f7315504d3fb78561c285462fb6f899223c599: It allows you to understand the speech of the Ugthanki, my patron animals, and other camels.
textByHash.8ffca6301b1ec322ca22fa36b6c6bb0a20dc0d14: It is also bound to the desert, and can thus transport you back to this temple if you wish.
textByHash.a14d554be28b46829c13efe30e422f7cd35d3ebd: Ha ha... in that case, I'm sure lord Zaros will be happy to intervene.
textByHash.de9963786b17b4314f19c357533a951fdbd01402: It'll be a pleasure to fight you once more...
